name: scep
title: SCEP Credential
description: A SCEP identity that the device generates.

payloadkeys.title: Name
payloadkeys.content: Any string that the SCEP server recognizes. For example, it could be a domain name such as `example.org`. If a certificate authority has multiple CA certificates, you can use this field to specify the required certificate.

payloadkeys.title: Subject
payloadkeys.content:
The representation of an X.500 name is an array of OID and value. For example, `/C=US/O=Apple Inc./CN=foo/1.2.5.3=bar` corresponds to:

`[ [ ["C", "US"] ], [ ["O", "Apple Inc."] ], [ [ "CN", "foo"] ], [ [ "1.2.5.3", "bar" ] ] ]`

You can represent OIDs as dotted numbers or use shortcuts for country (`C`), locality (`L`), state (`ST`), organization (`O`), organizational unit (`OU`), and common name (`CN`).

subkeys.title: SCEP Subject Array Pair Item
subkeys.content: One item in the array representing a pair of OID and value

payloadkeys.title: Key Size
payloadkeys.content: The key size in bits, either `1024`, `2048`, or `4096`.

payloadkeys.title: Key Type
payloadkeys.content: The key type, which always has the value `RSA`.

payloadkeys.title: Key Usage
payloadkeys.content: A bitmask that specifies the use of the key: `1` is signing, `4` is encryption, and `5` is both signing and encryption. Some certificate authorities, such as Windows CA, support only encryption or signing, but not both at the same time.

payloadkeys.title: Fingerprint
payloadkeys.content: The fingerprint of the Certificate Authority certificate.

payloadkeys.title: Retries
payloadkeys.content: The number of times the device should retry if the server sends a `PENDING` response.

payloadkeys.title: Retry Delay
payloadkeys.content: The number of seconds to wait between subsequent retries. The system makes the first retry without this delay.

payloadkeys.title: Subject Alt Name
payloadkeys.content: The subject's alternative name for the certificate.

subkeys.title: NT Principal Name
subkeys.content: The NT principal name. Use an other name OID set to `1.3.6.1.4.1.311.20.2.3`.
